messages.content: Open Chrome and search HD video
Opening Chrome and searching for HD video. Chrome may not play HD videos like Edge due to extension conflicts, and disabling problematic extensions can resolve this issue.

what am I holding right now

what is on the screen right now

The current screen shows the conversation we've been having, Moksh. Additionally, Spotify now displays lyrics directly on the Now Playing screen, allowing users to see lyrics without scrolling, with an option to disable the lyric display.
